SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2020 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAR-11-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BARBARA EDWARDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN, COLLECTIONS AGENT. THIS CASE IS CONTINUED FOR THE PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE AND RESPOND TO THE MOTION TO DISMISS THE DEFENDANT BROUGHT TO THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS GIVEN A COPY OF THE MOTION TO DISMISS AT THE HEARING. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF BARBARA EDWARDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CCSF, REPRESETNED BY GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. PARTIES AGREE TO MEDIATION. AGREEMENT IS REACHED JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EDWARDS, BARBARA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2019 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO JAN-10-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES WITH WORKING PHONE NUMBERS ON FILE WERE ADVISE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
